---
title: "Market Timing Model Example"
author: "Harry He"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
bibliography: references.bib
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Market Timing Model Example}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{makecell}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Core package (required)
library(capnet)

# Optional packages for vignette
needed <- c(
  "glmnet", "lbfgs", "xtable", "ggplot2",
  "dplyr", "tidyr", "purrr", "lubridate", "zoo"
)

missing <- needed[!vapply(needed, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]

if (length(missing) > 0) {
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
  message(
    "Optional packages not installed: ",
    paste(missing, collapse = ", "),
    ". Code chunks will not be evaluated."
  )
} else {
  library(glmnet)
  library(lbfgs)
  library(xtable)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(zoo)
}

if (length(missing) == 0) {
  source("helpers.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
}
```

```{r data, result="asis"}
data <- read.csv(system.file("extdata", "data.csv", package = "capnet"))
vars_to_keep <- c("X", "target", "S2", "E2", "E3", "P9", "S1", "S5", "I2", "P8", 
                  "P10", "P12", "P13", "U1", "U2")
data <- data |> 
  mutate(
    `U1` = `I1`-`I2`,
    `U2` = `M11` / (`I2` + `I9` + `I7`) * 3
  ) |> 
  select(all_of(vars_to_keep))


print(calc_moments(data[, c(-1,-2)]))
```

```{r experiment}
results <- rolling_enet(
  data,
  date_col = "X",
  target_col = "target",
  alpha = 0.5,
  window_years = 25,
  method = c("capnet_walk", "capnet", "postcap"),
  eval_start = "2020-01-01"
)

predictions <- list()
methods <- c()
mu_vals <- c()
combos <- results$predictions %>% 
  dplyr::distinct(method, mu) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(method, mu)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(combos))) {
  m <- combos$method[i]
  mu_j <- combos$mu[i]
  
  tmp <- results$predictions %>% 
    dplyr::filter(method == m, mu == mu_j)
  
  predictions[[i]] <- tmp
  methods[i] <- m
  mu_vals[i] <- mu_j
}

```

```{r fig.height = 6.5, fig.width = 10}
selected_idx <- c(1, 2, 6)

rolling_list <- lapply(selected_idx, function(i) {
  df <- rolling_oos_r2(predictions[[i]], window = 252) |>
    tidyr::drop_na()

  df$spec <- paste0(
    methods[i],
    ifelse(mu_vals[i] == 0, "", paste0(" (Îł=", mu_vals[i], ")"))
  )

  df
})

plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(rolling_list) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(X = as.Date(X))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = X, y = r2_roll, color = spec, group = spec)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Uncapped" = "steelblue",
    "Post-Fit Cap" = "firebrick",
    "Walk-forward Capnet (Îł=100)" = "darkolivegreen4"
  )) +

  # --- FIX DATE AXIS ---
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(
      from = as.Date("2020-01-01"),
      to   = max(plot_df$X),
      by   = "6 months"
    ),
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) + 

  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = expression(R^2),
    color = "Model"
  ) +

  # --- WHITE BACKGROUND ---
  theme_bw(base_size = 16) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),   # cleaner time axis
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)
  )
```


```{r}
summary_table <- lapply(1:6, function(i) {
  tibble::tibble(
    method = methods[i],
    gamma = ifelse(mu_vals[i] == 0, NA_real_, mu_vals[i]),
    oos_r2 = calc_oos_r2(predictions[[i]])
  )
}) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows()

print(summary_table)
```

```{r runtime}
start_glmnet <- Sys.time()
models <- rolling_enet(
  data,
  date_col = "X",
  target_col = "target",
  alpha = 0.5,
  window_years = 25,
  method = c("glmnet"),
  eval_start = "2020-01-01"
)
end_glmnet <- Sys.time()
time_glmnet <- end_glmnet - start_glmnet

sprintf("Backtest runtime for glmnet: %.2f seconds", time_glmnet)

start_capnet <- Sys.time()
models <- rolling_enet(
  data,
  date_col = "X",
  target_col = "target",
  alpha = 0.5,
  window_years = 25,
  method = c("capnet"),
  eval_start = "2020-01-01"
)
end_capnet <- Sys.time()
time_capnet <- end_capnet - start_capnet
sprintf("Backtest runtime for capnet: %.2f seconds", time_capnet)

start_capnet_walk <- Sys.time()
models <- rolling_enet(
  data,
  date_col = "X",
  target_col = "target",
  alpha = 0.5,
  window_years = 25,
  method = c("capnet_walk"),
  walk_mu = c(0.1),
  eval_start = "2020-01-01"
)
end_capnet_walk <- Sys.time()
time_capnet_walk <- end_capnet_walk - start_capnet_walk
sprintf("Backtest runtime for walk-forward capnet: %.2f seconds", time_capnet_walk)
```
